# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do, in 1-2 sentences? -->

## Related
- Closes #
- Feature spec: `docs/features/<name>.md`
- ADR: `docs/adr/<id>.md` (if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: no functional change
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] chore: tooling / deps

## Changes
<!-- Bullet list of notable changes -->
-
-

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] E2E tests added / updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Manual QA performed (describe below)

**Manual QA notes:**
<!-- What you tested manually -->

## Definition of Done Checklist
- [ ] Code follows `docs/CODING_STANDARDS.md`
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest`, `npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff`, `black`, `eslint`)
- [ ] Type-check passes
- [ ] No new dependencies (or justified below)
- [ ] No secrets / credentials committed
- [ ] Docs updated (API, ADR, feature spec, `progress.md`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Migrations are additive and reversible (if applicable)

<!-- For UI changes, attach screenshots or short videos -->
